title: MoYouno 8M Long Retractable Dog Leash with Poo Bag Holder, Heavy Duty Pet Lead - Durable Automatic Extendable Dog Training Leash with Floodlight (Blue)
features: 🐾Heavy Duty Retractable Dog Lead:The 8m dog leads strong retractable provides a great freedom of movement for dogs, running, hiking ect.

🐾 Strong Retractable Dog Lead:Adopted Premium ABS + Soft TPE materials, extendable dog lead large breed with anti-slip rubberised soft grip handle, Alloy Hook, Eco-friendly, super comfortable ergonomic grip and anti-slip handle.The thoughtful addition of a portable poo bag holder (including a roll of 15 waste bags) allows you to conveniently dispose of your dog's waste without having to rifle through your pockets.

🐾360° Tangle Free Retractable Dog Lead: Suitable for Large dogs with tractive force of 110lbs(50KG) tolerated.Meanwhile, the leash is equipped with a detachable LED Lighting to ensure the safety of your pet and yourself during your late-night walks.

🐾Dog Leads For Medium Dogs 8m： Retractable and stop with lock button, Easy to Brake/Pause/Lock with one-hand brake button at handy place, dog leads for small dogs with pause function allows you to adjust the distance between you and your pets at anytime.
🐾Dog leash is a daily consumable for families with pets. In order to ensure sufficient safety and comfortable use experience, it is recommended to replace it once a year.
description: Product Description One-touch non-slip button Easy to pull forward, stretch freely Durable Rustproof Swivel Hook 360° Rotatable Hook,offer the dog freedom on the lead. Detachable Garbage Bag Dispebser contain 15 pcs of bags, helping you clean up the dog's waste without dirtying your hands. Detachable LED Flash Light Scientific design, comfortable touch, rich and bright colors Best gift for the master and the dog

keepa.title: DEKTON Pro 7 Function Spray Nozzle | Adjustable Watering Patterns for Gardens, Lawns, and Outdoor Cleaning | Ergonomic Grip | Durable & Leak-Proof Design | Ideal for Plants, Car Washing, and More
features: 7 Versatile Spray Patterns: This Dekton spray nozzle offers eight adjustable spray settings, including mist, shower, jet, cone, flat, center, and full, providing versatility for all your watering needs.
Ergonomic Comfort Grip: Designed with an ergonomic, non-slip grip handle for added comfort during extended use. Ensures you can water your garden or clean outdoor surfaces with ease and precision.

Leak-Proof Design: Constructed , leak-proof materials, this spray nozzle ensures a steady and reliable water flow without waste. Perfect for reducing water consumption while maintaining optimal performance.

Durable & Long-Lasting: Built to withstand outdoor elements, the nozzle is made from durable, rust-resistant materials. It ensures long-lasting functionality for regular garden watering, car washing, and outdoor cleaning.

Quick & Easy Connection: The spray nozzle easily attaches to standard garden hoses for quick setup and use. Ideal for a variety of outdoor tasks, from watering delicate plants to cleaning cars, patios, and outdoor furniture.
